<script lang="ts">
	import type { Snippet } from 'svelte';
	import type { HTMLAttributes } from 'svelte/elements';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	type Props = HTMLAttributes<HTMLTableSectionElement> & { class?: string; children?: Snippet };
	let { class: className, children, ...rest }: Props = $props();
</script>

<tbody class={cn('[&_tr:last-child]:border-0', className)} {...rest}>
	{@render children?.()}
</tbody>

<script lang="ts">
	import type { Snippet } from 'svelte';
	import type { HTMLAttributes } from 'svelte/elements';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	type Props = HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement> & { class?: string; children?: Snippet };
	let { class: className, children, ...rest }: Props = $props();
</script>

<caption class={cn('mt-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground', className)} {...rest}>
	{@render children?.()}
</caption>
{@render children?.()}

<script lang="ts">
	import type { Snippet } from 'svelte';
	import type { HTMLAttributes } from 'svelte/elements';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	type Props = HTMLAttributes<HTMLTableSectionElement> & { class?: string; children?: Snippet };
	let { class: className, children, ...rest }: Props = $props();
</script>

<tfoot
	class={cn('border-t border-border bg-secondary/50 font-semibold [&>tr]:last:border-b-0', className)}
	{...rest}
>
	{@render children?.()}
</tfoot>

<script lang="ts">
	import type { Snippet } from 'svelte';
	import type { HTMLThAttributes } from 'svelte/elements';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	type Props = HTMLThAttributes & { class?: string; children?: Snippet };
	let { class: className, children, ...rest }: Props = $props();
</script>

<th
	class={cn(
		'h-10 px-3 text-left align-middle font-semibold text-muted-foreground [&:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0',
		className
	)}
	{...rest}
>
	{@render children?.()}
</th>

<script lang="ts">
	import type { Snippet } from 'svelte';
	import type { HTMLAttributes } from 'svelte/elements';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	type Props = HTMLAttributes<HTMLTableSectionElement> & { class?: string; children?: Snippet };
	let { class: className, children, ...rest }: Props = $props();
</script>

<thead class={cn('[&_tr]:border-b [&_tr]:border-border', className)} {...rest}>
	{@render children?.()}
</thead>

<script lang="ts">
	import type { Snippet } from 'svelte';
	import type { HTMLAttributes } from 'svelte/elements';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	type Props = HTMLAttributes<HTMLTableRowElement> & { class?: string; children?: Snippet };
	let { class: className, children, ...rest }: Props = $props();
</script>

<tr
	class={cn(
		'border-b border-border transition-colors hover:bg-secondary/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-accent',
		className
	)}
	{...rest}
>
	{@render children?.()}
</tr>
{@render children?.()}
